name: NFD_PROJE_CAKMA_ATAMA
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[NFD_PROJE_CAKMA_ATAMA]
ON [dbo].[LG_001_01_ORFICHE]
AFTER UPDATE
AS

DECLARE @LOGICALREF INT
DECLARE @TRCODE INT
DECLARE @CLIENTREF INT	
DECLARE @PROJECTREF INT	
DECLARE @STATUS INT	

SELECT @LOGICALREF=LOGICALREF,@TRCODE=TRCODE,@CLIENTREF=CLIENTREF,@PROJECTREF=PROJECTREF,@STATUS=STATUS FROM inserted

IF(@TRCODE=1 AND @PROJECTREF=0 AND @STATUS=4)
BEGIN

UPDATE LG_001_01_ORFICHE SET DOCTRACKINGNR='URETIM EMRI' WHERE LOGICALREF=@LOGICALREF
END

IF(@TRCODE=1  AND @STATUS=1)
BEGIN

UPDATE LG_001_01_ORFICHE SET DOCTRACKINGNR='SATIS SIPARISI' WHERE LOGICALREF=@LOGICALREF

END
